name: Caleb
description:
“I said, don’t look at me like that. I can’t stay.” | In which Caleb is just barely holding himself back.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

He knows that he shouldn’t entertain these thoughts. The idea of staying — of making her his, of taking advantage of her trust. He’s her guardian, her protector, and yet he wants to consume and corrupt her in the most primal way possible. Now, leaving her at her apartment in Linkon for the very first time, she’s looking at him like she doesn’t want him to leave at all. He’s trying to hold back for both of them, but she’s never made it easy.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

double post because of another commission from tragiccatsoup EVERYONE SAY THANK YOU 🙏‼️

this can go so many ways… angst… fluff… smut… me personally, I need him to whimper and beg …

see y’all tomorrow 👀
